data.title: El Salvador's Nayib Bukele Says 'Maybe We'll All Get The Chance To Buy Bitcoin At A Discount' After DOJ Clears Sale Of Over 69K BTC
data.description: Nayib Bukele, President of El Salvador, suggested that Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) might soon be available at a reduced price.

data.title: Charlie Munger's Top Pick Costco Reports Strong December Sales: Analysts Expect A 7% Jump In January
data.description: Costco (COST) reported strong sales for December and is expected to see a 7% jump in January 2025 core sales.

data.title: Airbus CEO Warns Of 'Very Strong' US Protectionism Under Trump
data.description: He noted that supply chains are still recovering from the pandemic's disruptions

data.title: Google Donates $1 Million To Trump Inauguration, Plans YouTube Livestream: 'Pleased To Support'
data.description: Google has donated $1 million to Donald Trump's inauguration fund and will livestream the Jan. 20 event.

data.title: Openreach Taps Nokia For UK Fiber Expansion: Details
data.description: Nokia's One Network Platform chosen by Openreach to build open-access fiber network in UK, help connecting 25M homes & businesses by 2026.
